name: openhuman
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        tinyhumansai /

      openhuman  

    
      Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.
summary: "OpenHuman 是一个用Rust编写的个人AI超级智能工具，注重隐私、简洁且功能强大。"

name: Open-Generative-AI
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Anil-matcha /

      Open-Generative-AI  

    
      Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — Free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.
summary: 这是一个开源AI视频生成平台，提供200多种模型（如Flux、Midjourney等）的免费图像和视频生成功能，支持自托管且无内容过滤。值得关注因为它是MIT许可的替代方案，可自由定制且不受商业平台限制。

name: DreamServer
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Light-Heart-Labs /

      DreamServer  

    
      Local AI anywhere, for everyone — LLM inference, chat UI, voice, agents, workflows, RAG, and image generation. No cloud, no subscriptions.
summary: DreamServer是一个本地化AI工具，提供LLM推理、聊天界面、语音、智能体、工作流、RAG和图像生成功能，无需云端或订阅服务，适合所有人使用。

name: codegraph
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        colbymchenry /

      codegraph  

    
      Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
summary: codegraph 是一个为 Claude Code 预构建的本地代码知识图谱，能减少 token 消耗和工具调用，提升效率。

name: ai-agents-for-beginners
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        microsoft /

      ai-agents-for-beginners  

    
      12 Lessons to Get Started Building AI Agents
summary: 该项目是微软推出的面向初学者的AI智能体开发教程，包含12节Jupyter Notebook课程，帮助用户快速掌握构建AI代理的核心技能，适合想入门AI应用开发的人群关注。

name: bun
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        oven-sh /

      bun  

    
      Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
summary: Bun 是一个集 JavaScript 运行时、打包工具、测试运行器和包管理器于一体的高性能工具，因其极速表现和多功能集成而值得关注。

name: CLI-Anything
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        HKUDS /

      CLI-Anything  

    
      "CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native" -- CLI-Hub: https://clianything.cc/
summary: HKUDS/CLI-Anything 是一个Python项目，旨在通过命令行界面（CLI）实现所有软件的自动化操作，使任何软件都能成为智能代理的原生工具。值得关注的原因是它通过统一的CLI接口简化了软件自动化流程，提升了开发效率和灵活性。

name: agent-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        tech-leads-club /

      agent-skills  

    
      The secure, validated skill registry for professional AI coding agents. Extend Antigravity, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot and more with absolute confidence.
summary: 该项目是面向专业AI编程代理的安全验证技能库，可安全扩展Antigravity、Claude Code等主流AI编程工具的功能。
